description_long: This house features a sprawling, L-shaped layout with multiple interconnected sections and open courtyards. The structure is predominantly white, with large rectangular windows arranged in rows along the exterior walls, providing ample natural light. Several palm trees are integrated into the courtyards, adding a touch of greenery and suggesting a warm climate. The roof is primarily flat, with some areas featuring parapet walls and open terraces. The main entryway is grand, with a wide set of steps leading to a colonnaded porch and a central fountain visible in the courtyard. The overall design blends modern and Mediterranean influences, emphasizing open spaces and outdoor living.
description: A large, white L-shaped house with flat roofs, open courtyards, palm trees, and rows of rectangular windows. The design features a grand entryway with steps, columns, and a central courtyard fountain.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the main facade with rows of windows, a prominent entryway, and visible palm trees in the courtyard.
description_view_1: This side view reveals the elongated wing of the house, the open colonnaded section, and additional palm trees within the courtyard.
description_view_2: The rear view showcases the central courtyard with a fountain, the colonnaded porch, and the open, airy layout of the house.
description_view_3: This side view emphasizes the flat roofs, parapet walls, and the integration of greenery within the house's layout.
attribute_entryway_design: Grand entry with wide steps, colonnaded porch, and central courtyard fountain
